scripts.dev: echo '📦 [MDOS] 开发环境启动于: ' && date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S' && concurrently "pnpm --filter api start:dev" "pnpm --filter web dev"
scripts.dev:fast: echo '🚀 [MDOS] 快速启动于: ' && date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S' && (lsof -ti:3001 | xargs -r kill 2>/dev/null; concurrently "cd apps/api && node dist/main.js" "pnpm --filter web dev")
scripts.build: pnpm --filter api build && pnpm --filter web build
